# Security Policy

## Reporting a vulnerability

If you find a security issue in rageval, please email
SujalS12328@gmail.com rather than opening a public GitHub issue.

We will respond within 48 hours.

## Scope

rageval is a local evaluation library. It makes outbound API calls
to LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.) using credentials you
provide. We do not store or transmit your data or API keys.
